description_long: This is a rectangular, one-liter beverage carton labeled 'Paradise Pineapple' from the brand 'Everyday A Better Day.' The front features a vibrant image of a pineapple and pineapple slices, with water splash graphics and a green 'Premium Quality' badge. The carton is predominantly white and blue, with nutritional facts and multilingual product information on the sides and back. The top is sealed with a white plastic screw cap, slightly offset to one side, and the carton has a glossy, water-resistant finish. The packaging is made of laminated paperboard with a plastic lining, typical for juice or water cartons. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, with clear branding and product imagery.
description: A rectangular, one-liter 'Paradise Pineapple' beverage carton with a white plastic screw cap, vibrant pineapple imagery, and blue-white branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the nutrition facts panel and part of the 'Paradise' logo, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full 'Paradise Pineapple' branding, pineapple imagery, and the green 'Premium Quality' badge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring a barcode, recycling symbols, and multilingual product information, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_3: Back view showing detailed nutritional information and additional product text in multiple languages.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Paradise Pineapple' in large white and blue text, 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' logo in red at the top, a green 'Premium Quality' badge, and pineapple imagery. Sides and back have nutrition facts, barcode, recycling symbols, and multilingual product information in smaller fonts.
attribute_cap_type: White plastic screw cap, round, slightly raised, with ridged edges for grip.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the carton material does not allow visibility of the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, flat-topped neck integrated into the carton, with a circular opening for the screw cap and no visible ridges or flares.
